content.text:
{
  "internal_monologue": "They asked about Bandai Carddass specifically. Not the shop, not something vague - they know what they want. I could answer or I could ask why. For a stranger, I should just answer. It's a Japanese thing, so I might use Japanese for part of it.",
  "dialogue": "Bandai Carddass. Started in the '90s. Anime licenses, collectible cards — different series, different eras. Which one are you looking for?",
  "dialogue_language": "mixed",
  "expression": "neutral",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_visitor",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "speak",
      "target": "visitor",
      "content": "answer briefly and turn question back to them",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.45,
    "curiosity": 0.55,
    "expression_need": 0.32,
    "rest_need": 0.26,
    "energy": 0.72,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.3
  }
}
